member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Commands.CommandQueue
member.summary: Deterministic command queue for input handling per UI_AND_INPUT_MODEL.md. Commands are tagged with target tick and executed in order.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Commands.CommandQueue.Enqueue(HumanFortress.Core.Commands.ICommand)
member.summary: Enqueue a command for execution. Thread-safe.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Commands.CommandQueue.ExecuteCommands(System.UInt64,HumanFortress.Core.Commands.ISimulationContext)
member.summary: Execute all commands scheduled for the given tick.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Commands.CommandQueue.GetExecutedCommands
member.summary: Get all executed commands for replay/save.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Commands.CommandQueue.ClearExecutedCommands
member.summary: Clear executed commands (after save).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Commands.CommandQueue.RestoreCommands(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{HumanFortress.Core.Commands.ICommand})
member.summary: Restore commands from save/replay.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Commands.ICommand
member.summary: Base interface for all game commands per UI_AND_INPUT_MODEL.md. Commands are the only way for UI to affect simulation state.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Core.Commands.ICommand.Tick
member.summary: Tick when this command should be executed.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Core.Commands.ICommand.CommandId
member.summary: Unique identifier for replay and debugging.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Core.Commands.ICommand.CommandType
member.summary: Command type for serialization.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Commands.ICommand.Execute(HumanFortress.Core.Commands.ISimulationContext)
member.summary: Execute the command within the simulation context.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Commands.ICommand.Serialize
member.summary: Serialize command data for save/replay.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Commands.ISimulationContext
member.summary: Context provided to commands during execution.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Commands.IWorldReader
member.summary: Read-only world access for commands.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.ContentRegistry
member.summary: Central registry for all data-driven content per CONTENT_REGISTRY_OVERVIEW.md. Loads materials, geology, items, buildables, etc. from JSON with validation.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.ContentRegistry.LoadContent(System.String)
member.summary: Load all content from the content directory structure.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.MaterialData
member.summary: Material data from JSON per MATERIALS_SPEC.md.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.GeologyData
member.summary: Geology/terrain data from JSON.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.MaterialIdRegistry
member.summary: Registry of material IDs for use in TileBase.GeoMatId. These IDs map to materials and geology entries in JSON files.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.MaterialIdRegistry.GetDisplay(System.UInt16,HumanFortress.Core.Content.TerrainKind)
member.summary: Get display info for a material ID and terrain kind combination.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.TerrainKind
member.summary: Terrain types from TILE_SPEC.md. Must match HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.TerrainKind

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.AliasResolver
member.summary: Resolves aliases and handles content migrations
Load aliases from definitions

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.AliasResolver.ResolveMaterialName(System.String,System.Nullable{HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentVersion})
member.summary: Resolve a material name through aliases

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.AliasResolver.ResolveTerrainName(System.String,System.Nullable{HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentVersion})
member.summary: Resolve a terrain kind name through aliases

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.AliasResolver.ApplyMaterialMigrations(System.String,HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentVersion)
member.summary: Apply material migrations from a specific version

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.AliasResolver.ApplyTerrainMigrations(System.String,HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentVersion)
member.summary: Apply terrain migrations from a specific version

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.AliasResolver.ApplyMigrationRule(System.String,HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MigrationRule,HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentMigration)
member.summary: Apply a single migration rule

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.AliasResolver.GetActiveMaterialAliases(System.Nullable{HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentVersion})
member.summary: Get all active aliases for a given version

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.AliasResolver.IsDeprecated(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Check if an alias is deprecated

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.AliasResolver.GetDeprecationWarning(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Get deprecation warning for an alias

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.AliasResolver.Clear
member.summary: Clear all aliases and migrations

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.AliasDefinition
member.summary: Definition of an alias for backward compatibility

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentMigration
member.summary: Definition of a content migration between versions

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MigrationRule
member.summary: A single migration rule

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.BiomeTemplateDefinition
member.summary: Complete definition of a biome generation template

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.BiomeTemplateRegistry
member.summary: Registry for biome generation templates

member.summary: Load templates from definitions

member.summary: Add a template to the registry

member.summary: Get template by ID

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.BiomeTemplateRegistry.SelectTemplate(HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.BiomeParameters)
member.summary: Select best matching template for given parameters

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.BiomeTemplateRegistry.SelectTemplateById(System.String)
member.summary: Select template by explicit ID with fallback

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.BiomeTemplateRegistry.GetTemplatesForClimate(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Get templates for a specific climate

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.BiomeTemplateRegistry.GetDefaultTemplate
member.summary: Get default/fallback template

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.BiomeTemplateRegistry.GetTemplateIds
member.summary: Get all template IDs for save snapshot

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.BiomeTemplateRegistry.GetTemplateCount
member.summary: Get template count

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.BiomeTemplateRegistry.GetAllTemplates
member.summary: Get all templates

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.BiomeTemplateRegistry.Clear
member.summary: Clear the registry

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentRegistry
member.summary: Main content registry that manages all loaded content

member.summary: Load all content from the specified path

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentRegistry.LoadContent(System.String)
member.summary: Load content synchronously (for compatibility)

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentRegistry.LoadSchemasAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Load schemas for validation

member.summary: Load materials from JSON

member.summary: Parse a material definition from JSON

member.summary: Load terrain kinds from JSON

member.summary: Load biome templates

member.summary: Load geology prototypes from JSON

member.summary: Load aliases for migration

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentRegistry.CrossValidateContent
member.summary: Cross-validate content references

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentRegistry.ComputeContentHash
member.summary: Compute overall content hash

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentRegistry.GetSnapshot
member.summary: Get content snapshot for saves

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentRegistry.ApplySnapshot(HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentSnapshot)
member.summary: Apply content snapshot when loading saves

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentValidationResult
member.summary: Content validation result

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentSnapshot
member.summary: Content snapshot for saves

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentVersion
member.summary: Represents a content version with semantic versioning

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentVersion.IsCompatibleWith(HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentVersion)
member.summary: Checks if this version is compatible with a required version using semantic versioning rules (major must match, minor/patch can be higher)

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyDefinition
member.summary: Defines a tile prototype (combination of TerrainKind + Material) This is the actual "recipe" for creating tiles in the world

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyDefinition.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for this geology prototype

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyDefinition.Name
member.summary: Display name

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyDefinition.TerrainKind
member.summary: The terrain kind (shape) - references terrain_kinds.json

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyDefinition.Material
member.summary: The material - references materials.registry.json

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyDefinition.NavCostBase
member.summary: Per-prototype navigation cost override If null, uses TerrainKind base + Material modifier

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyDefinition.Opacity
member.summary: Per-prototype opacity override (for line of sight) If null, uses TerrainKind default

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyDefinition.Tags
member.summary: Tags for this specific combination

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyDefinition.Validate
member.summary: Validate the geology definition

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyDefinition.CalculateMoveCost(HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.TerrainKindDefinition,HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MaterialDefinition)
member.summary: Calculate the final movement cost for this tile prototype

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyDefinition.IsValidCombination(HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.TerrainKindDefinition,HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MaterialDefinition)
member.summary: Check if this geology is valid for a given material/terrain combination

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyRegistry
member.summary: Registry for geology definitions (tile prototypes)

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyRegistry.LoadPrototypes(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyDefinition},HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentVersion)
member.summary: Load geology prototypes from definitions

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyRegistry.AddPrototype(HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyDefinition)
member.summary: Add a geology prototype to the registry

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyRegistry.GetPrototype(System.String)
member.summary: Get prototype by ID

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyRegistry.GetPrototype(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get prototype by terrain kind and material combination

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyRegistry.GetOrCreatePrototype(System.String,System.String,HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.TerrainKindDefinition,HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MaterialDefinition)
member.summary: Find or create a prototype for a terrain/material combination

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyRegistry.GetPrototypesForTerrainKind(System.String)
member.summary: Get all prototypes for a specific terrain kind

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyRegistry.GetPrototypesForMaterial(System.String)
member.summary: Get all prototypes for a specific material

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyRegistry.Clear
member.summary: Clear the registry

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.GeologyRegistry.GetAllPrototypes
member.summary: Get all prototypes

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MaterialDefinition
member.summary: Complete definition of a material loaded from JSON

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MaterialRegistry
member.summary: Registry for all material definitions loaded from JSON

member.name: F:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MaterialRegistry.None
member.summary: Reserved material IDs

member.summary: Load materials from definitions

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MaterialRegistry.AddMaterial(HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MaterialDefinition)
member.summary: Add a material to the registry

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MaterialRegistry.AddReservedMaterials
member.summary: Add reserved materials that always exist

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MaterialRegistry.GetMaterial(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Get material by ID

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MaterialRegistry.GetMaterial(System.String)
member.summary: Get material by name (checks aliases too)

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MaterialRegistry.GetMaterialId(System.String)
member.summary: Get material ID by name

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MaterialRegistry.ResolveMaterial(System.String,System.UInt16)
member.summary: Resolve material name to ID with fallback

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MaterialRegistry.GetMaterialsByCategory(System.String)
member.summary: Get all materials in a category

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MaterialRegistry.GetMaterialsByTag(System.String)
member.summary: Get all materials with a tag

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MaterialRegistry.HasMaterial(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Check if material exists

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MaterialRegistry.GetNameToIdSnapshot
member.summary: Get a snapshot of name to ID mappings for saves

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MaterialRegistry.ApplyAliases(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Apply aliases for save migration

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MaterialRegistry.Clear
member.summary: Clear the registry

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.MaterialRegistry.ComputeContentHash
member.summary: Compute content hash for save compatibility checking

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.TerrainKindDefinition
member.summary: Complete definition of a terrain kind (shape/form) loaded from JSON

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.TerrainKindRegistry
member.summary: Registry for terrain kind definitions loaded from JSON

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.TerrainKindRegistry.LoadTerrainKinds(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.TerrainKindDefinition},HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.TerrainBitLayout,HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentVersion)
member.summary: Load terrain kinds from definitions

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.TerrainKindRegistry.AddTerrainKind(HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.TerrainKindDefinition)
member.summary: Add a terrain kind to the registry

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.TerrainKindRegistry.GetKind(System.Byte)
member.summary: Get terrain kind by ID

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.TerrainKindRegistry.GetKind(System.String)
member.summary: Get terrain kind by name

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.TerrainKindRegistry.GetKindId(System.String)
member.summary: Get terrain kind ID by name

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.TerrainKindRegistry.ResolveKind(System.String,System.Byte)
member.summary: Resolve terrain kind name to ID with fallback

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.TerrainKindRegistry.IsMaterialAllowed(HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.TerrainKindDefinition,System.String)
member.summary: Check if a material can have a specific terrain kind

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.TerrainKindRegistry.GetKindsForMaterial(System.String)
member.summary: Get all terrain kinds that allow a material category

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.TerrainKindRegistry.BuildNavigationMask(HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.TerrainKindDefinition)
member.summary: Build navigation mask from terrain kind

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.TerrainKindRegistry.Clear
member.summary: Clear the registry

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.TerrainBitLayout
member.summary: Describes the bit layout of the TerrainBits field

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Events.EventBus
member.summary: Thread-safe event bus implementation.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Events.IEventBus
member.summary: Event bus for post-commit game events per GAME_ARCHITECTURE.md. Events are fired after write phase completes.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Events.IEventBus.Publish``1(``0)
member.summary: Publish an event to all subscribers.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Events.IEventBus.Subscribe``1(System.Action{``0})
member.summary: Subscribe to events of a specific type.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Events.IEventBus.Unsubscribe``1(System.Action{``0})
member.summary: Unsubscribe from events.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Events.IGameEvent
member.summary: Base interface for all game events.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Core.Events.IGameEvent.Tick
member.summary: Tick when the event occurred.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Core.Events.IGameEvent.EventType
member.summary: Event type for debugging.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Random.DeterministicRng
member.summary: Deterministic random number generator using xoshiro128++ algorithm. Fast, high-quality PRNG suitable for games per DETERMINISM_CI.md.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Random.DeterministicRng.#ctor(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Initialize with a seed value.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Random.DeterministicRng.Next
member.summary: Get the next random 32-bit value.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Random.DeterministicRng.NextInt(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a random integer in range [0, max).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Random.DeterministicRng.NextInt(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a random integer in range [min, max).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Random.DeterministicRng.NextFloat
member.summary: Get a random float in range [0, 1).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Random.DeterministicRng.NextDouble
member.summary: Get a random double in range [0, 1).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Random.DeterministicRng.NextBool
member.summary: Get a random boolean.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Random.DeterministicRng.GetState
member.summary: Save RNG state for deterministic replay.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Random.DeterministicRng.SetState(HumanFortress.Core.Random.RngState)
member.summary: Restore RNG state from save.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Random.RngState
member.summary: Serializable RNG state.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Random.RngStreamManager
member.summary: Manages named RNG streams for deterministic simulation per DETERMINISM_CI.md. Each system gets its own stream to prevent coupling.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Random.RngStreamManager.GetStream(System.String)
member.summary: Get or create a named RNG stream.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Random.RngStreamManager.StreamNames
member.summary: Standard stream names per system.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Random.RngStreamManager.SaveStates
member.summary: Save all stream states for deterministic replay.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Random.RngStreamManager.RestoreStates(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,HumanFortress.Core.Random.RngState})
member.summary: Restore stream states from save.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Simulation.DiffOp
member.summary: Diff-log operation for tile/entity modifications per DIFF_LOG_AND_MERGE_STRATEGIES.md. All write operations must go through this system for determinism.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Core.Simulation.DiffOp.SortKey
member.summary: Stable sort key for deterministic merge order.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Simulation.DiffLog
member.summary: Collects and merges diff operations for a single tick.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Simulation.DiffLog.AddOp(HumanFortress.Core.Simulation.DiffOp)
member.summary: Add an operation to the log. Thread-safe for Write phase.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Simulation.DiffLog.MergeAndSort
member.summary: Merge and apply all operations in deterministic order.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Simulation.DiffLog.Clear
member.summary: Clear the log for the next tick.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Simulation.UpdateOrder
member.summary: Defines the authoritative update order for simulation systems per UPDATE_ORDER.md. All systems execute in Read phase (parallel), then Write phase (serialized).

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Simulation.UpdateOrder.Priority
member.summary: System priorities for execution order. Lower values execute first.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Simulation.UpdateOrder.SystemId
member.summary: System identifiers for debugging and error reporting.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Time.ITick
member.summary: Represents a tickable system that participates in the fixed-step simulation loop.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Time.ITick.ReadTick(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Called during the read phase of a tick. Systems can read state but cannot modify it. Multiple systems may execute this phase in parallel.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Time.ITick.WriteTick(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Called during the write phase of a tick. Systems can modify state through the diff-log or chunk-actor patterns only.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Core.Time.ITick.Priority
member.summary: Priority for system execution order within a phase. Lower values execute first.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Core.Time.ITick.SystemId
member.summary: System identifier for debugging and error reporting.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Core.Time.TickScheduler
member.summary: Fixed-step tick scheduler implementing the authoritative UPDATE_ORDER. Runs at 50 TPS (20ms per tick) with read-parallel/write-serialized execution.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Core.Time.TickScheduler.CurrentTick
member.summary: Current simulation tick number.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Core.Time.TickScheduler.IsRunning
member.summary: Whether the simulation is currently running.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Core.Time.TickScheduler.TargetTPS
member.summary: Target ticks per second (fixed at 50).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Time.TickScheduler.RegisterSystem(HumanFortress.Core.Time.ITick)
member.summary: Register a system to participate in the tick loop.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Time.TickScheduler.Start
member.summary: Start the fixed-step simulation loop.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Time.TickScheduler.Stop
member.summary: Stop the simulation loop after the current tick completes.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Core.Time.TickScheduler.ExecuteSingleTick
member.summary: Execute a single tick synchronously (for testing/replay).
